segments.text: Defense crumbles in this range - landing and ledge getup are totally exposed!
segments.original_text: このところは防御面が弱くなるので着地だったり崖上がり弱くなるんですよね

segments.text: Wrath capitalizes and locks him out at the ledge!
segments.original_text: そこをうまく突いて崖決めきりましたねWrath選手

segments.text: But now raru's making the edgeguard play!
segments.original_text: さあしかしどうだ今度は崖で攻めきったのはらる

full_text: Defense crumbles in this range - landing and ledge getup are totally exposed! Wrath capitalizes and locks him out at the ledge! But now raru's making the edgeguard play! raru too!
